nodes.summary: Specifies the Node.js version for the project.

nodes.summary: NPM package manifest defining project metadata, scripts, and dependencies.

nodes.summary: Detailed project plan for GhostProtocol covering overview, audience, tech stack, phases, file structure, next steps, and risks.

nodes.summary: Skill definition for ui-ux-pro-max providing UI/UX design intelligence.
